families.title: Bytecode-compatible condition evaluation
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case conditions.yara_like.batch.16x64k --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-01-condition-eval.json
cpu_sota_contracts: conditions.yara_like.eval.1m => Rayon-parallel scalar short-circuit rule loop 100x
metadata.condition.filesize_header.1m => optimized CPU PE-header predicate evaluator 50x
release.condition_eval.1m => optimized CPU rule-condition evaluator with SIMD-friendly bitmap inputs 100x
release.megakernel_queue.1m => optimized CPU batched condition evaluator 100x
release.quantified_condition_loops.1m => optimized CPU short-circuit quantified-condition evaluator 100x
release.string_bitmap_scatter.1m => Hyperscan/ripgrep-class CPU pattern bitmap materialization 100x
runtime.megakernel.condition.64k => optimized CPU condition evaluator baseline 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: optimized CPU rule-condition evaluator with SIMD-friendly bitmap inputs

families.title: String bitmap scatter
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case release.string_bitmap_scatter.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-02-string-bitmap-scatter.json
cpu_sota_contracts: release.string_bitmap_scatter.1m => Hyperscan/ripgrep-class CPU pattern bitmap materialization 100x

families.title: Offset/count/length aggregation
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case conditions.yara_like.eval.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-03-offset-count-aggregation.json
cpu_sota_contracts: conditions.yara_like.eval.1m => Rayon-parallel scalar short-circuit rule loop 100x
release.offset_count_aggregation.1m => SIMD CPU aggregation over sorted match streams 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: SIMD CPU aggregation over sorted match streams

families.title: PE/header/file metadata condition evaluation
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case conditions.yara_like.eval.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-04-metadata-conditions.json
cpu_sota_contracts: conditions.yara_like.eval.1m => Rayon-parallel scalar short-circuit rule loop 100x
metadata.condition.filesize_header.1m => optimized CPU PE-header predicate evaluator 50x

families.title: Entropy/window predicates
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case conditions.yara_like.eval.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-05-entropy-window.json
cpu_sota_contracts: conditions.yara_like.eval.1m => Rayon-parallel scalar short-circuit rule loop 100x
release.entropy_window.1m => SIMD CPU rolling histogram entropy implementation 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: SIMD CPU rolling histogram entropy implementation

families.title: Bounded quantified condition loops
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case release.quantified_condition_loops.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-06-quantified-condition-loops.json
cpu_sota_contracts: release.quantified_condition_loops.1m => optimized CPU short-circuit quantified-condition evaluator 100x

families.title: Alias-aware reaching-definition predicates
families.non_megakernel_justification: architectural: alias-aware reaching-definition workloads use sparse relation kernels with fixpoint convergence rather than independent condition-slot dispatch
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case lower.alias_aware_optimizations --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-07-alias-reaching-def.json
cpu_sota_contracts: release.alias_reaching_def.1m => LLVM-style sparse dataflow and alias analysis baseline 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: LLVM-style sparse dataflow and alias analysis baseline

families.title: IFDS reachability and witness predicates
families.non_megakernel_justification: architectural: IFDS witness extraction uses frontier/fact-table scheduling and predecessor reconstruction that need dataflow-specific kernels
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case release.ifds_witness.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-08-ifds-witness.json
cpu_sota_contracts: release.ifds_witness.1m => optimized CPU graph reachability and witness extraction 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: optimized CPU graph reachability and witness extraction

families.title: C AST traversal and motif predicates
families.non_megakernel_justification: architectural: C AST traversal consumes parser-owned AST buffers with table/stream access patterns that remain outside the condition megakernel for this release
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case frontend.c.parser.linux_driver_pipeline --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-09-c-ast-traversal.json
cpu_sota_contracts: frontend.c.parser.linux_driver_pipeline => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 1000x
frontend.c.parser_only.linux_driver_pipeline => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 1x
frontend.c.parser_sema.linux_driver_corpus100 => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 1x
frontend.c.syntax_only.linux_driver_corpus10 => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 10x
frontend.c.syntax_only.linux_driver_corpus100 => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 3x
frontend.c.syntax_only.linux_driver_corpus1000 => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 10x
frontend.c.syntax_only.linux_driver_pipeline => Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal 10x
release.c_ast_traversal.1m => tree-sitter/libclang-class CPU AST traversal baseline 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: Tree-sitter C in-process parse + full AST traversal

families.title: Persistent megakernel queued condition batches
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case release.megakernel_queue.1m --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-10-megakernel-queued-batches.json
cpu_sota_contracts: release.megakernel_queue.1m => optimized CPU batched condition evaluator 100x
runtime.megakernel.condition.64k => optimized CPU condition evaluator baseline 100x

families.title: E-graph rewrite saturation and optimization impact
families.non_megakernel_justification: architectural: e-graph saturation is a bounded rewrite worklist with fuel and equivalence-class state, so it uses saturation-specific kernels
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case foundation.optimizer.impact --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-11-egraph-saturation.json
cpu_sota_contracts: release.egraph_saturation.1m => egg/egraph CPU saturation baseline with equivalent rewrite set 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: egg/egraph CPU saturation baseline with equivalent rewrite set

families.title: Sparse fired-rule readback and output compaction
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case conditions.yara_like.batch.16x64k --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-12-sparse-output-compaction.json
cpu_sota_contracts: sparse.compaction.count.1m => optimized CPU fired-rule collection over predicate masks 100x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: optimized CPU fired-rule collection over predicate masks

families.title: Graph traversal and callgraph reachability
families.non_megakernel_justification: architectural: callgraph reachability is frontier graph traversal with convergence state, not independent rule-condition slot evaluation
families.benchmark_command: cargo_full run -p vyre-bench -- run --suite release --case callgraph.reachability.step.262k --backend cuda --enforce-budgets --output release/evidence/benchmarks/workload-13-callgraph-reachability.json
cpu_sota_contracts: callgraph.reachability.step.262k => optimized CPU graph reachability and witness extraction 25x
cpu_sota_baseline_names: optimized CPU graph reachability and witness extraction
